gates.detail: line-search samples must match the aggregate objective samples
provide a passed holdout artifact with a new surface_index or alpha

notes: This check gates claim promotion only. Passing aggregate reduced-objective FD and line-search artifacts proves optimizer plumbing; it does not by itself validate optimized-equilibrium nonlinear transport. Promotion requires independent held-out surface or field-line evidence.

requirements: aggregate line-search artifact passes on the same sample set
at least one passed validation artifact covers a held-out surface_index or field-line alpha
k_y-only holdouts do not satisfy the surface/field-line requirement
